channel.title: Intigriti — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Intigriti (intigriti).

item.title: CVE-2026-3327 · 4.8 MEDIUM — Authenticated DatoCMS Web Previews Plugin Iframe Injection
item.description: Authenticated Iframe Injection in Dato CMS Web Previews plugin. This vulnerability permits a malicious authenticated user to circumvent the restriction enforced on the configured frontend URL, enabling the loading of arbitrary external resources or o…
